targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(AVG(pct), 1) as value FROM (SELECT substr(t.date,1,7) as month, SUM(ABS(COALESCE(t.amount_base, t.amount))) / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(monthly_limit) FROM budget_targets WHERE monthly_limit > 0), 0) * 100 as pct FROM transactions t WHERE t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= date('now', '-12 months') GROUP BY month)
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(AVG(pct), 1) as value FROM (SELECT substr(t.date,1,7) as month, SUM(ABS(COALESCE(t.amount_base, t.amount))) / NULLIF((SELECT SUM(monthly_limit) FROM budget_targets WHERE monthly_limit > 0), 0) * 100 as pct FROM transactions t WHERE t.tx_type='expense' AND t.date >= date('now', '-12 months') GROUP BY month)

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT substr(date,1,7) as month, category, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as spent FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= date('now', '-12 months') AND category_group IN (${category_group:sqlstring}) GROUP BY month, category ORDER BY month DESC, spent DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT substr(date,1,7) as month, category, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as spent FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= date('now', '-12 months') AND category_group IN (${category_group:sqlstring}) GROUP BY month, category ORDER BY month DESC, spent DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT m.month, b.category, COALESCE(t.spent, 0) as actual_spent, b.monthly_limit as budget_limit, CASE WHEN b.monthly_limit > 0 THEN ROUND(COALESCE(t.spent, 0) / b.monthly_limit * 100, 1) ELSE NULL END as pct_used FROM budget_targets b CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT substr(date,1,7) as month FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-12 months')) m LEFT JOIN (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as month, category, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as spent FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= date('now', '-12 months') GROUP BY month, category) t ON t.month = m.month AND t.category = b.category WHERE b.monthly_limit > 0 AND b.category IN (${category:sqlstring}) ORDER BY m.month DESC, b.category
targets.queryText: SELECT m.month, b.category, COALESCE(t.spent, 0) as actual_spent, b.monthly_limit as budget_limit, CASE WHEN b.monthly_limit > 0 THEN ROUND(COALESCE(t.spent, 0) / b.monthly_limit * 100, 1) ELSE NULL END as pct_used FROM budget_targets b CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT substr(date,1,7) as month FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-12 months')) m LEFT JOIN (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as month, category, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as spent FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= date('now', '-12 months') GROUP BY month, category) t ON t.month = m.month AND t.category = b.category WHERE b.monthly_limit > 0 AND b.category IN (${category:sqlstring}) ORDER BY m.month DESC, b.category

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT substr(date,1,7) || '-07' as time, category_group, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND category_group IN ('Essential', 'Discretionary') AND date >= date('now', '-12 months') GROUP BY substr(date,1,7), category_group ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT substr(date,1,7) || '-07' as time, category_group, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as total FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND category_group IN ('Essential', 'Discretionary') AND date >= date('now', '-12 months') GROUP BY substr(date,1,7), category_group ORDER BY time

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', substr(date,1,7) || '-07') AS INTEGER) as time, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as total_spent, (SELECT SUM(monthly_limit) FROM budget_targets WHERE monthly_limit > 0) as total_budget FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= date('now', '-12 months') GROUP BY substr(date,1,7) ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', substr(date,1,7) || '-07') AS INTEGER) as time, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as total_spent, (SELECT SUM(monthly_limit) FROM budget_targets WHERE monthly_limit > 0) as total_budget FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= date('now', '-12 months') GROUP BY substr(date,1,7) ORDER BY time

targets.rawQueryText: WITH curr AS (SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as spent FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND category_group IN (${category_group:sqlstring}) GROUP BY category), prev AS (SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as spent FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= date('${cycle}-07', '-1 month') AND date < '${cycle}-07' AND category_group IN (${category_group:sqlstring}) GROUP BY category) SELECT curr.category, curr.spent as current_spend, COALESCE(prev.spent, 0) as prev_spend, ROUND(curr.spent - COALESCE(prev.spent, 0), 2) as change_pln, CASE WHEN COALESCE(prev.spent, 0) > 0 THEN ROUND((curr.spent - prev.spent) / prev.spent * 100, 1) ELSE NULL END as change_pct FROM curr LEFT JOIN prev ON prev.category = curr.category ORDER BY change_pln DESC
targets.queryText: WITH curr AS (SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as spent FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= '${cycle}-07' AND date < date('${cycle}-07', '+1 month') AND category_group IN (${category_group:sqlstring}) GROUP BY category), prev AS (SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as spent FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= date('${cycle}-07', '-1 month') AND date < '${cycle}-07' AND category_group IN (${category_group:sqlstring}) GROUP BY category) SELECT curr.category, curr.spent as current_spend, COALESCE(prev.spent, 0) as prev_spend, ROUND(curr.spent - COALESCE(prev.spent, 0), 2) as change_pln, CASE WHEN COALESCE(prev.spent, 0) > 0 THEN ROUND((curr.spent - prev.spent) / prev.spent * 100, 1) ELSE NULL END as change_pct FROM curr LEFT JOIN prev ON prev.category = curr.category ORDER BY change_pln DESC

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT m.month, b.category, COALESCE(t.spent, 0) as spent, b.monthly_limit as budget, CASE WHEN b.monthly_limit > 0 THEN ROUND(COALESCE(t.spent, 0) / b.monthly_limit * 100, 1) ELSE NULL END as pct_used FROM budget_targets b CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT substr(date,1,7) as month FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-12 months')) m LEFT JOIN (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as month, category, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as spent FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' GROUP BY month, category) t ON t.month = m.month AND t.category = b.category WHERE b.monthly_limit > 0 ORDER BY m.month DESC, b.category
targets.queryText: SELECT m.month, b.category, COALESCE(t.spent, 0) as spent, b.monthly_limit as budget, CASE WHEN b.monthly_limit > 0 THEN ROUND(COALESCE(t.spent, 0) / b.monthly_limit * 100, 1) ELSE NULL END as pct_used FROM budget_targets b CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT substr(date,1,7) as month FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-12 months')) m LEFT JOIN (SELECT substr(date,1,7) as month, category, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as spent FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' GROUP BY month, category) t ON t.month = m.month AND t.category = b.category WHERE b.monthly_limit > 0 ORDER BY m.month DESC, b.category

panels.title: Detailed Budget History (All Categories x 12 Months)

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', substr(date,1,7) || '-07') AS INTEGER) as time, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as spent, COALESCE((SELECT monthly_limit FROM budget_targets WHERE category = '${category}'), 0) as budget_limit FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= date('now', '-12 months') AND category = '${category}' GROUP BY substr(date,1,7) ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', substr(date,1,7) || '-07') AS INTEGER) as time, ROUND(SUM(ABS(COALESCE(amount_base, amount))), 2) as spent, COALESCE((SELECT monthly_limit FROM budget_targets WHERE category = '${category}'), 0) as budget_limit FROM transactions WHERE tx_type='expense' AND date >= date('now', '-12 months') AND category = '${category}' GROUP BY substr(date,1,7) ORDER BY time
